title: Netherite tools for Crackers witherstorm mod
description: Allows for the making of Netherite command block tools in Crackers witherstorm mod
body:
Allows for the making of Netherite command block tools in Crackers witherstorm mod.
To craft the tools you either need to have diamond command block tool and upgrade it to netherite like in the vanilla game or combine a netherite tool with an enchanted command block book in an anvil.
